strengths: Extensive hands-on backend engineering experience, including designing high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Strong architectural foundation in event-driven systems and containerized deployments, demonstrated through projects like GISCollective.
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators.
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience and has no demonstrated track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
Does not meet the hard requirement of extensive production experience building and operating stateful multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes environments.
Missing domain expertise in heavy fintech infrastructure, specifically algorithmic working-capital management and real-time credit risk.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer with strong technical craftsmanship and deep expertise in building event-driven, high-throughput backend systems. However, he falls significantly short of the requirements for an executive-level CTO position. He currently lacks the necessary experience in scaling engineering organizations, managing external delivery partners, and architecting complex, production-grade multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes fintech applications.
